name: Hard Money Global
description_short: Hard Money Global is a hard money and private money lending brokerage specializing in asset-based real estate loans for investors with flexible credit requirements.
description_long:
Hard Money Global was established in 2008 in response to the Mortgage Meltdown and has grown into a network-based lending platform with over 400 lending partners. The company positions itself as a full-service hard money and private money brokerage that focuses on funding asset-based loans rather than credit-dependent financing. Their primary clientele consists of real estate investors seeking alternative financing solutions outside traditional banking channels.

The company offers a range of lending products centered on real estate financing, including hard money loans, private money loans, and fix-and-flip financing. Their stated approach emphasizes asset-based underwriting rather than credit-score-dependent decisions, positioning themselves as capable of approving borrowers with less-than-perfect credit. They market their ability to close "challenging files quickly and efficiently" and claim to see opportunities where traditional lenders identify problems.

Hard Money Global differentiates itself through its A+ BBB rating and its self-described status as a "trusted leader" in hard money lending with a network model rather than a single-entity operation. The company frames its mission around helping real estate investors achieve financing goals and the "American Dream of homeownership." They emphasize flexibility and creative funding solutions tailored to individual client needs.

A significant caveat is that the website contains substantial placeholder text (Lorem ipsum) and generic banking service descriptions that don't align with their actual hard money lending focus, suggesting website quality issues. While the company claims BBB A+ rating and an established track record since 2008, the website lacks specific loan terms, rates, approval timelines, or detailed underwriting criteria that would enable prospective borrowers to properly evaluate their offerings.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Established in 2008 with 15+ years of operating history through real estate financing cycles
Network of 400+ lending partners providing multiple funding source options
A+ BBB rating indicating complaint resolution and business standing
Asset-based underwriting approach that considers property value over credit scores
Full-service brokerage model offering hard money, private money, and fix-and-flip financing
Marketing emphasis on fast closing timelines for challenging real estate transactions
Toll-free phone number (877-344-4273) and physical office address in Detroit, MI for accessibility
cons: Website contains extensive placeholder text and generic banking descriptions unrelated to hard money lending, suggesting poor web presence quality
No specific loan terms, interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules disclosed on the website
Limited transparency on approval timelines, loan-to-value requirements, or minimum/maximum loan amounts
No borrower testimonials, case studies, or specific examples of funded transactions provided
Vague service descriptions without concrete details on hard money loan structures, terms, or qualification criteria
best_for: Real estate investors seeking fix-and-flip financing with non-traditional credit profiles
Property investors who need fast capital approval based on asset value rather than credit history
Borrowers unable to qualify for conventional mortgage financing through traditional banks
diagnosis: Hard Money Global is best suited for real estate investors with strong collateral assets but weaker credit profiles who need faster approval than traditional banks provide. The main caveat is that the website lacks specific loan terms, rates, and detailed qualification criteria, requiring direct contact to understand actual lending parameters and costs—and the site's heavy placeholder text raises questions about operational credibility.
services: Hard money loans for real estate investors
Network broker access to 400+ lending partners
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
